items.title: To Understand Pope Leo’s Efforts on A.I., Look at the Man Shaking His Hand
items.summary: The co-founder of a prominent A.I. company was nearby as the pope implored A.I. leaders to slow down and consider the technology’s possible perils.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.
